Petition For Waiver Of Probate Referee
Off Calendar Aug-31-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Connie Yee for the Executor.

Ms. Yee stated that estate only had two Beneficiaries, that both Beneficiaries waived the Inventory and Appraisal and that they were trying to save as much money as possible for the Petitioner. The Court denied the Petition For Waiver Of Probate Referee.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Maria Lertora, CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-18-2009 Granted Per Written Order
